AC1.evidence: List creation reads profiles first and inserts only when missing; existing profile fields are preserved.

AC2.evidence: Migration normalizes handles and repairs LOWER(handle) duplicates before creating the unique expression index.

AC3.evidence: Notifications render row link/static content and Read button as siblings; static check found no nested interactive remnants.

AC4.evidence: Missing list query redirects to /lists and invalid explicit ids call notFound instead of falling back.

AC5.evidence: Later mobile .v2-modal-panel.v2-owner-settings-panel rule wins over generic .v2-modal-panel mobile rule.

AC6.evidence: lint, typecheck, build, and unit tests passed.

notes: Viewport-specific Playwright backend smoke was unavailable because the target page/context was closed; CSS specificity/order was verified statically.
